creator: anatoly.borodin@gmail.com
text:
# grep -r '\<gsc$' --include 'pkg-plist*' /usr/ports/
/usr/ports/lang/gambc/pkg-plist:bin/gsc
/usr/ports/print/ghostscript-gpl/pkg-plist:bin/gsc
/usr/ports/print/ghostscript-gnu/pkg-plist:%%SHLIB%%bin/gsc

3 ports install /bin/gsc binary.

Fix: 

Add the correspondent CONFLICTS variables.
